admin-dashboard.notes: Full admin with login, 7 pages, social pack generator

sharing.notes: SharePanel on all content pages, 7 platforms + native share + copy link

chapter-images.notes: 18 chapters with Wikimedia Commons images, grayscale-to-color hover

analytics.notes: Server-side analytics with country detection, daily trends, top pages

social-packs.notes: 8 pre-written posts, canvas carousel generator, copy-to-clipboard

book-reader.notes: Full reading interface with TTS, font controls, download modal

evidence-system.notes: Three-tier system with proper styling, tooltips, source counts

auth-system.notes: Neon PostgreSQL backend with JWT sessions, bcrypt hashing

nyt-design.notes: Monochrome palette, crimson accents, professional typography

seo.notes: SSR meta injection, OG tags, Twitter cards, structured data, complete sitemap (47 URLs)

build-reliability.notes: npx tsc for CI, no iCloud artifacts, clean build

ads.notes: AdBanner configurable via AD_CLIENT constant; empty = ads off, no JS errors

print-styles.notes: Comprehensive: @page margins, evidence tiers in grayscale, URL expansion, dark→light inversion, page-break rules
